purpose: Restrict agent edits to current surfaces, designated work surfaces, or explicitly declared exception scope.
notes: Current surfaces are always writable because they are the governed truth surfaces already reviewed by existing routing, integrity, and claim checks.
Tooling and package-doctor surfaces are writable because repository hardening work must be able to land without first opening unrelated prose files.
Non-current support files outside this list require explicit declaration before editing.
The current local worktree also carries an explicitly declared Taiwan-route and release-support exception scope so edit-scope audits remain usable during bounded active route work.
